prompt: Write the home-page A/B test variant B for openpatent.ai. Hero CTA headline = 'File your invention for $149 — court-admissible proof in 10 minutes.' Sub-headline (≤28 words) must (a) name the 6-layer cryptographic disclosure (SHA-3/512, HMAC, Ed25519, Bitcoin OTS, C2PA, hash-chained audit), (b) contrast $149 with the $4,200 attorney alternative, (c) anchor the proof in 10 minutes via Bitcoin OTS confirmation. Three supporting bullets (each ≤18 words) must name: (1) the 10+ jurisdictional coverage (US 35 USC 102, EU eIDAS, WIPO 2022), (2) the .ai domain portfolio (openpatent.ai, ipcastle.ai, legalof.ai, harvi.ai), (3) the 22/33 BFT sovereign-temple v3.0. Primary CTA button text: 'File for $149'. Secondary CTA: 'See the 6-layer proof'. Hero image brief: a glowing hexagonal disclosure receipt with a Bitcoin block-height caption. Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {headline:string, subheadline:string, bullets:[3 strings], primary_cta:string, secondary_cta:string, image_brief:string, signature:string}.
